title: Ilena Xan

{{Quote|Eight contestants remain. May the Force be with you.|Ilena Xan|<ref name="YDR" />}}
'''Ilena Xan''' served in the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] during the last days of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. She was a close friend of Master [[Jai Maruk]] and worked in the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] as a hand-to-hand combat trainer, her specialty being the bondage holds. She was called '''Iron Hand''' by her students, which was due to her rough nature and strong body. Her top student during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] was [[Tallisibeth Enwandung-Esterhazy|Scout]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|In real life, we rarely get optimal combat conditions. One might find oneself attacked in null gravity, for instance. Or by surprise, or by a droid or other creature whose physiology made certain techniques difficult or impossible. Of course, introducing a Gorax into the Temple is not practical. But there are some things we can do. For instance, in real life it is often dark.|Ilena Xan during the Jedi Apprentice Tournament.|<ref name="YDR" />}}
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], Ilena Xan received [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], attaining the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] by the time of the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]]. A colleague of fellow Master [[Jai Maruk]], Xan was appointed as an [[Jedi instructor|instructor]] of [[Broken Gate|unarmed combat]], which she taught at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]].<ref name="YDR" />

During her tenure at the academy, Master Xan acquired the nickname "Iron Hand," referencing her rough teaching skills when it came to hand-to-hand combat. When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] erupted between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], Master Xan remained at the Temple instead of fighting on the front lines, continuing to train students in order to keep the Order's supply of Knights steady. Hosting the [[Jedi academy|academy's]] annual [[Jedi Temple Apprentice Tournament|Apprentice tournaments]], Master Xan ensured that the students remained civil and disciplined during the competition.<ref name="YDR" />

==Equipment==
Ilena Xan had a red handkerchief that she used to signal the start of a duel during the Apprentice Tournament.<ref name="YDR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Ilena Xan first appeared in ''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'', a novel written by [[Sean Stewart]] and published in [[2004]].<ref name="YDR" />

==Appearances==
